title: Finding gross annual income from a weekly wage
problem: Priya earns $\$820$ per week. Calculate her gross annual income.

steps.instruction: Identify the number of weeks in a year.
steps.working: There are $52$ weeks in a year.

title: Calculating income tax from a bracket table
problem:
Ben has a taxable income of $\$48\,500$ per year. Using the tax table below, calculate his annual income tax.

| Taxable income | Tax payable |
|:---|:---|
| $\$0 - \$18\,200$ | Nil |
| $\$18\,201 - \$45\,000$ | $19$ c for each $\$1$ over $\$18\,200$ |
| $\$45\,001 - \$120\,000$ | $\$5092$ plus $32.5$ c for each $\$1$ over $\$45\,000$ |

steps.instruction: Identify which bracket the income falls in.
steps.working: $\$48\,500$ is between $\$45\,001$ and $\$120\,000$, so use the third row of the table.

steps.instruction: Find the amount of income above $\$45\,000$.
Apply the bracket formula: base tax plus $32.5$ c per dollar above $\$45\,000$.

title: Finding net weekly pay after tax and deductions
problem:
Natalie earns $\$2600$ per fortnight. She has $\$2000$ in allowable deductions. Using the tax table below, find her net weekly pay after income tax and deductions.

| Taxable income | Tax payable |
|:---|:---|
| $\$0 - \$18\,200$ | Nil |
| $\$18\,201 - \$45\,000$ | $19$ c for each $\$1$ over $\$18\,200$ |
| $\$45\,001 - \$120\,000$ | $\$5092$ plus $32.5$ c for each $\$1$ over $\$45\,000$ |

steps.instruction: Calculate gross annual income from the fortnightly wage.
Identify the correct tax bracket and calculate income tax.
Subtract income tax and deductions to find net annual income.
Divide by $52$ to find net weekly pay.
